Article: Evangelion was written 20 years in the future
[]: Evangelion was written 20 years in the future             Quote Post by san » Thu Jul 18, 2013 4:55 pm With the EV plug Alliance (EVA!), some of the most influential companies in the electric industry are joined to develop the diffusion of electric vehicles. Nowadays the technology of the umbilical cables is finally ready! [url]http://pinterest.com/pin/545498573585888510/[/url] The similarity is incredible, isn't it? [/img]
